heading: Special rule
label: 1101d Special rule
text: No Hispanic-serving institution that is eligible for and receives funds under this subchapter may receive funds under part A or B of subchapter III during the period for which funds under this subchapter are awarded.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .section 505 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1102d of this titlePub. L. 105–244Another prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 505 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1091d of this titlePub. L. 94–482
